name: list_workstreams
description: List active child workstreams. By default returns your own non-closed children — the common "what's still running?" query. Pass `parent_ws_id` to list another parent's children. Pass `include_closed=true` to also return soft-closed rows. An explicit `state` filter (e.g. `state="closed"`) overrides the default and returns matching terminal rows regardless of `include_closed`. Deleted rows never appear (delete cascades the row out of storage). Coordinator-kind workstreams are excluded.

parent_ws_id.description: Parent workstream id. Omit to list the caller coordinator's own children; pass a value to list that parent's children.

state.description: Optional state filter — 'idle', 'thinking', 'running', 'attention', 'error', 'closed'. Matched exactly. An explicit state filter OVERRIDES the default-exclude-closed behavior, so state="closed" still returns closed rows. Deleted workstreams are not stored, so 'deleted' is not a valid filter.

skill.description: Optional skill_id filter (template id, NOT skill name). Workstreams inherit skill_id at creation time.

include_closed.description: When true, include soft-closed children in the default (no-state-filter) listing. Default false — "what's still running?" is the common coordinator query. Ignored when an explicit state filter is set. (Deleted children are not stored — they cascade out — so they never appear here regardless of this flag.)
